gist.headline: Copy, Paste, Generate
gist.blurb: ClipGen-m joins the hive! A handy Windows utility that brings LLM powers right to your system tray.
gist.summary: Added ClipGen-m, a Windows system-tray utility for integrating LLMs with clipboard content, to the Dev Tools collection.
gist.impact: Windows users can now easily access AI processing for copied text directly from their desktop.
gist.visual_concept: ClipGen-m is a clipboard utility. Visual metaphor: The Nomnom creature (who eats data) is the perfect fit here, snacking on text coming from a clipboard. The Bee oversees the process.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating text snippets from a floating pixelated clipboard. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny gear icon. Lime green (#ecf874) and pastel blue gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'CLIPGEN'. Nostalgic and functional.
